summary: A simple, vertically stacked one-page business homepage with lots of white space, centered typography, and strong red accent buttons. The page feels like a straightforward small-agency/contractor site: logo and company name at top, a large hero image, an intro section with a single CTA, then two promotional tiles and a sparse footer with contact details.

layout.summary: A simple, vertically stacked one-page business homepage with lots of white space, centered typography, and strong red accent buttons. The page feels like a straightforward small-agency/contractor site: logo and company name at top, a large hero image, an intro section with a single CTA, then two promotional tiles and a sparse footer with contact details.

sections.name: Top brand header
sections.description: At the very top on a white background, a red stylized 'R' logo sits aligned left. Centered across the top is the company name in a thin gray font, with the tagline below it in quotes. There is no visible multi-link navigation in the header area on this mobile screenshot.
sections.copy_gist: Red's Residential & Restaurant Construction; 'It is our pleasure to build for you'

sections.name: Primary hero image
sections.description: A large full-width-ish photograph dominates the page below the header, showing an outdoor seating area with two chairs and a small table behind a glass railing, trees and neighborhood scenery in the background. The image is framed with white margins around it and functions as the main visual focal point.
components: image carousel-style chevron overlays at left and right edges
sections.copy_gist: No visible overlaid text on the image

sections.name: Intro / value proposition
sections.description: Centered text block on white background with a large all-caps headline, a short paragraph, and a prominent red button beneath. The section is airy and minimal, with all content centered and plenty of whitespace around it.
sections.copy_gist: UNIQUE BEAUTIFUL SPACES; Red's Construction has been delighting clients with building restaurants and homes in the California Bay Area since 2012... We'd love to hear from you.

sections.name: Primary contact CTA
sections.description: A single centered rectangular red button appears below the intro paragraph, serving as the main action on the page. It is medium width with white uppercase text.

sections.name: Divider band
sections.description: A thick light-gray horizontal bar spans most of the content width, separating the intro from the next content area.

sections.name: Two-up story/client promo grid
sections.description: Below the divider, the page presents a mixed grid of image and text panels in a two-column rhythm: on the left a portrait photo of a bearded man against a wood background, then a centered text card labeled 'Our Story' with a red 'Read' button; on the right a photo of a black dog in a home interior, then another centered text card labeled 'Our Clients' with matching description and button. The arrangement feels like alternating image and text tiles rather than a uniform card layout.
sections.copy_gist: OUR STORY; Meet Devin Aloise, our founder. READ. OUR CLIENTS; and their pets share their love. READ.

sections.name: Bottom divider band
sections.description: Another thick light-gray horizontal bar appears beneath the grid, visually closing the content area before the footer.

sections.name: Footer
sections.description: The footer is simple and spacious with centered navigation links and contact info. A small set of text links is arranged in the middle, while licensing information appears on the left, contact phone/email icons and text sit near the bottom center, and a TimberTech Pro badge/logo is placed on the right.
sections.copy_gist: Home; Red's Service Division; Our Story; Our Clients; Licensed General Contractor #1112399; 707-634-3264; info@redsrrc.com; TimberTech PRO

header.nav_style: Minimal/no visible horizontal nav on this mobile view; branding-only top area with centered title and tagline.
header.logo_placement: Top-left corner, small red monogram logo.
header.links: No obvious header links visible; navigation appears deferred to the footer.

hero.subhead: A short credibility statement about building restaurants and homes in the California Bay Area since 2012 and offering design, remodeling, and general contracting.
hero.imagery: Large lifestyle/project photo of an outdoor patio/deck seating area with chairs, table, glass railing, and landscape background.

color_impressions.overall_palette_feel: Clean, sparse, and contractor-professional with red used as the only strong brand accent against a mostly white canvas.

typography_impressions.heading_body_feel: Thin, modern, airy sans-serif headings with lighter weight body copy; overall typography is understated and elegant.
typography_impressions.scale_weight: Large centered all-caps section heading, smaller subhead/body text, medium-sized button labels, and light-weight brand/title text.

layout.corner_style: Mostly square corners; buttons and panels appear rectilinear with minimal rounding, if any.
layout.imagery_style: Real-life project and personal photos, documentary-style, with bright natural light and a casual authentic feel rather than polished corporate stock imagery.

footer.columns: Effectively three zones: left license text, center links/contact, right partner badge.

layout.responsive_notes: This mobile view is mostly single-column and stacked, with the exception of the promo area that still reads as a two-column/multi-tile layout. On smaller screens, the footer likely wraps into stacked rows, while the centered text blocks and buttons remain full-width-ish and easy to tap.
